register.registerSuccess: Iakhawunti yakho yenziwe ngempumelelo! Uthunyelwa kwiphepha lokungena...

forgotPassword.title: Ndilibele inombolo yokuvula.
forgotPassword.description: Faka idilesi yakho ye-imeyile kwaye siza kukuthumelela ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona igama lokugqitha.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona igama lokugqitha lithunyelwe kwidilesi yakho ye-imeyile. Nceda ujonge ibhokisi yakho yokungenayo.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Kwenzeke impazamo. Nceda ujonge idilesi yakho ye-imeyile.

resetPassword.title: Seta igama eligqithisiweyo elitsha
resetPassword.description: Seta igama lokugqitha elitsha kwiakhawunti yakho.
resetPassword.successDescription: Iphasiwedi yakho ihlaziywe ngempumelelo. Ungangena ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: Ikhonkco lokuseta kwakhona igama lokugqitha alisebenzi okanye aliphelelanga. Nceda ujonge ikhonkco elikwi-imeyile yakho.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Igama eligqithisiweyo kufuneka libe nobude obuziimpawu ezi-6 ubuncinane.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Ukuseta kwakhona igama eligqithisiweyo akuphumelelanga. Uqhagamshelo lusenokuba alusebenzi okanye luphelelwe lixesha.

messages.title: Imiyalezo
messages.startConversation: Ukuze ubuze umbuzo malunga nentengiso, yiya kwintengiso.
messages.deleteConfirm: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuyicima le ngxoxo?

updatePassword.title: Hlaziya igama eligqithisiweyo
updatePassword.description: Hlaziya igama lakho lokugqitha rhoqo ukuze ukhuseleke kwiakhawunti yakho.
updatePassword.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi entsha kufuneka ibe nobude obuziimpawu ezi-6 ubuncinane.
updatePassword.errorDefault: Iphasiwedi ayikwazanga ukuhlaziywa. Nceda ujonge iphasiwedi yakho yangoku.

preferences.title: Isaziso kunye neeNgcebiso zokujonga
preferences.description: Lawula iziteshi zakho zesaziso kunye nezinto ozikhethayo zokubonisa.
preferences.emailNotificationsDesc: Fumana izaziso ze-imeyile zemiyalezo emitsha kunye nohlaziyo lwentengiso.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Fumana izaziso zokutyhala ukuze ufumane uhlaziyo olukhawulezileyo.
preferences.saveError: Kwenzeke impazamo ngelixa kuhlaziywa izinto ozikhethayo.

deleteAccount.title: Cima iAkhawunti
deleteAccount.description: Wakuba uyicimile iakhawunti yakho, akukho kubuyela umva. Yonke idatha yakho, uluhlu, kunye neencoko ziya kususwa ngonaphakade.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukucima iakhawunti yakho?
deleteAccount.warningProfile: Iprofayili yakho kunye nolwazi lwakho lomntu
deleteAccount.error: Ayiphumelelanga ukucima iakhawunti. Nceda ujonge igama lakho lokugqitha uze uzame kwakhona.

hero.title: Iqonga lokuRhweba ngeZilwanyana eziPhilayo
hero.subtitle: Iqonga lokurhweba ngezilwanyana eziphilayo elithembekileyo. Thenga kwaye uthengise iinkomo neegusha zakho ngokukhuselekileyo.

secure.title: Ukuthenga Ngokukhuselekileyo
secure.description: Zonke iintengiselwano zikhuselekile. Ulwazi lomthengisi nomthengi luqinisekisiwe.

variety.title: Uluhlu lweeMveliso eziBanzi
variety.description: Iinkomo, iigusha, nokunye. Fumana isilwanyana osifunayo ngokulula.

support.title: Inkxaso engama-24/7
support.description: Sisoloko silapha ukuze sikuncede ngemibuzo yakho. Umnxeba wethu wenkxaso ophilayo uyasebenza.

cta.title: Qala Ngoku
cta.subtitle: Thatha indawo yakho kwiqonga apho amawaka abathengisi nabathengi badibana khona.

footer.newsletterDescription: Ungaphoswa zizinto ezintsha ezidwelisiweyo kunye neentengiso.
footer.tagline: Iqonga lokurhweba ngezilwanyana eziphilayo elithembekileyo eTurkey.

faq.title: Imibuzo ebuzwa qho
faq.description: Iimpendulo zemibuzo yakho ebuzwa rhoqo malunga neqonga lethu.

about.title: Ngathi
about.subtitle: Iqonga lokurhweba ngezilwanyana eziphilayo elithembekileyo eTurkey.

mission.title: Umsebenzi Wethu
mission.description: Ngokwenza urhwebo lwezilwanyana eziphilayo lube lwedijithali, sijolise ekudaleni unxibelelwano olukhuselekileyo, olucacileyo, nolusebenzayo phakathi kwabavelisi nabathengi.

vision.title: Umbono Wethu
vision.description: Ukuba nguvulindlela ekutshintsheni kwedijithali kwicandelo lezolimo nokuba liqonga lehlabathi lorhwebo lwezilwanyana eziphilayo.

trust.title: Ukuthembana
trust.description: Ukungafihlisi nokuthembeka kubalulekile kuzo zonke iintengiselwano.

quality.title: Umgangatho
quality.description: Uphuculo oluqhubekayo ukuze kubonelelwe ngenkonzo engcono kakhulu.

form.title: Sibhalele
form.name: Ingama lakho
form.subject: Isihloko
form.success: Umyalezo wakho uthunyelwe ngempumelelo. Siza kubuyela kuwe ngokukhawuleza.
form.error: Kwenzeke impazamo xa bekuthunyelwa umyalezo. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

acceptance.title: 1. Ukwamkelwa kweMigqaliselo
acceptance.content: Ngokusebenzisa le webhusayithi, uyavuma le migaqo ilandelayo yokusebenzisa. Ukuba awuvumelani nale migaqo, nceda ungayisebenzisi le sayithi.

services.title: 2. Iinkonzo
services.content: I-Livestock Trading ibonelela ngeqonga lokuthenga nokuthengisa izilwanyana eziphilayo. Zonke iintengiselwano ezikwiqonga ziluxanduva lomsebenzisi.

accounts.title: 3. IiAkhawunti zabasebenzisi
accounts.content: Kufuneka unikezele ngolwazi oluchanekileyo noluhlaziyiweyo ukuze udale iakhawunti. Ukhuseleko lweakhawunti yakho luxanduva lwakho.

prohibited.title: 4. Imisebenzi Engavumelekanga
prohibited.content: Iintengiso ezilahlekisayo, ulwazi olungeyonyani, ubuqhetseba, kunye nemisebenzi engekho mthethweni azivumelekanga ngokungqongqo.

liability.title: 5. Umda woxanduva
liability.content: Eli qonga alinaxanduva ngokuthe ngqo kwiintengiselwano phakathi kwabasebenzisi. Zonke iintengiselwano zenzeka phakathi kwamaqela.

changes.title: 6. Utshintsho
changes.content: Le migaqo nemiqathango inokutshintsha ngaphandle kwesaziso. Utshintsho luya kuqala ukusebenza kwangoko emva kokupapashwa.

collection.title: 1. Ukuqokelelwa kolwazi
collection.content: Xa udala iakhawunti, siqokelela ulwazi lomntu siqu olufana negama lakho, idilesi ye-imeyile, kunye nenombolo yefowuni. Sisenokuqokelela nolwazi oluyimfihlo malunga nokusebenzisa kwakho le sayithi.

usage.title: 2. Ukusetyenziswa kolwazi
usage.content: Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo lusetyenziselwa ukubonelela ngeenkonzo zethu, ukulawula iakhawunti yakho, ukuqinisekisa ukhuseleko, kunye nokukunika izibonelelo ezenzelwe wena.

sharing.title: 3. Ukwabelana ngolwazi
sharing.content: Ulwazi lwakho lomntu aluyi kuthengiswa okanye kuqeshiswe kubantu besithathu. Ulwazi lwakho aluyi kwabelwana ngalo ngaphandle kweenjongo ezifunekayo ngokomthetho.

security.title: 4. Ukhuseleko
security.content: Amanyathelo okhuseleko asemgangathweni weshishini ayasebenza ukukhusela idatha yakho.

cookies.title: 5. Iikuki
cookies.content: Iwebhusayithi yethu isebenzisa iikuki ukuphucula amava omsebenzisi. Ungalawula ukhetho lwakho lweekuki kwizicwangciso zesikhangeli sakho.

rights.title: 6. Amalungelo Akho
rights.content: Phantsi koMthetho woKhuseleko lweDatha yoBuqu waseTurkey (KVKK), unelungelo lokufikelela, ukulungisa, nokucima idatha yakho yobuqu.

products.title: Iimveliso

productDetail.loginRequired: Nceda ungene ukuze wenze esi senzo.

shippingCarriers.deleteError: Kwenzeke impazamo xa kucinywa ulwazi lwenkampani yokuthumela.
shippingCarriers.fetchError: Kwenzeke impazamo ngexesha lokulayisha iinkampani zemithwalo.

shippingZones.noZones: Akukho ndawo yokuthwala impahla eyongeziweyo okwangoku.
shippingZones.saveError: Kwenzeke impazamo ngelixa kugcinwa le ndawo.
shippingZones.deleteError: Kwenzeke impazamo xa kucinywa le ndawo.

shippingRates.title: Iintlawulo zokuthumela
shippingRates.description: Lawula iindleko zokuthumela kunye neendlela zokuhambisa.

subscription.title: Izicwangciso zoBhaliso
subscription.cancelConfirmTitle: Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukurhoxisa ubhaliso lwakho?
subscription.cancelConfirmDescription: Ubhaliso lwakho luya kuhlala lusebenza kude kube sekupheleni kwexesha. Emva kokuba luphelile, uya kutshintshelwa kwisicwangciso sasimahla.
subscription.noSubscriptionDesc: Ngesicwangciso sasimahla, ungapapasha ukuya kuthi ga kwiintengiso ezi-3. Phucula isicwangciso sakho ukuze ufumane okungakumbi.
subscription.subscriptionExpired: Ubhaliso lwakho luphelelwe lixesha. Cofa ukuze uhlaziye.
subscription.subscriptionCancelled: Ubhaliso lwakho lurhoxisiwe. Lusebenza kude kube lixesha lokuphelelwa.

metadata.title: Urhwebo lweZilwanyana - Iqonga lokuRhweba ngeZilwanyana eziPhilayo
metadata.description: Iqonga lokurhweba ngezilwanyana elithembekileyo kwihlabathi liphela. Ukuthenga nokuthengisa izilwanyana ngokukhuselekileyo nangokucacileyo.

about.title: Ngathi
about.description: Funda ngokuRhweba ngezilwanyana. Iqonga elithembekileyo lokurhweba ngezilwanyana eziphilayo.

contact.title: Unxibelelwano
contact.description: Qhagamshelana nathi. Iqela lenkxaso kubathengi leLivestock Trading likulungele ukukunceda.

privacy.title: Umthetho wabucala
privacy.description: Umgaqo-nkqubo wabucala we-Livestock Trading. Funda indlela idatha yakho yobuqu ekhuselwe ngayo.

products.title: Iimveliso
products.description: Khangela uluhlu lwezilwanyana ezibukhoma. Iintengiso ezithembekileyo zeenkomo, iigusha, nokunye.

sellers.title: Abathengisi
sellers.description: Fumanisa abathengisi bezilwanyana abathembekileyo. Iiprofayili zomthengisi eziqinisekisiweyo kunye nophononongo.

transporters.title: abathuthi
transporters.description: Fumanisa iinkampani zothutho lwezilwanyana. Uthutho lwezilwanyana oluphilayo olukhuselekileyo nolunobungcali.

search.title: Khangela
search.description: Khangela phakathi koluhlu lwezilwanyana eziphilayo. Ukukhangela okulula ngokukhetha ukucoca nokucwangcisa.

faq.title: Imibuzo ebuzwa qho
faq.description: Imibuzo neempendulo ezibuzwa rhoqo malunga norhwebo lwemfuyo.

productDetail.title: {title} - Iyathengiswa
productDetail.description: Ithengiswa kwi {title} - {city}. Cofa ukuze ufumane iinkcukacha kunye nolwazi loqhagamshelwano.

sellerDetail.title: {igama} - Iprofayile yomthengisi
sellerDetail.description: Iprofayili yomthengisi ka-{name}. Uhlolo, uluhlu, kunye nolwazi loqhagamshelwano.

transporterDetail.title: {igama} - Iprofayile yoMthwali
transporterDetail.description: Iprofayili yomthuthi ka-{name}. Iindawo zenkonzo, uphononongo, kunye nolwazi loqhagamshelwano.

boost.title: Ukunyusa
boost.noBoostsDesc: Thenga iphakheji ye-boost ukuze ubonise iimveliso zakho.
boost.listingLimitReached: Ufikelele kumda woluhlu lwakho. Phucula isicwangciso sakho.

admin.title: Iphaneli yoLawulo
admin.subscriptionPlansDescription: Lawula izicwangciso zokubhalisa, amaxabiso, kunye neempawu.
admin.boostPackagesDescription: Lawula iipakeji zokunyusa, amaxabiso, kunye noseto lobude bexesha.
admin.editPlanDescription: Hlaziya iinkcukacha zesicwangciso, amaxabiso, imida, kunye neempawu.
admin.editPackageDescription: Hlaziya iinkcukacha zephakheji, amaxabiso, kunye nezicwangciso ze-boost.
admin.exchangeRatesDescription: Jonga onke amaxabiso okutshintshiselana kwemali kunye nemeko yawo yohlaziyo.
admin.exchangeRateInfo: Amaxabiso okutshintshiselana ahlaziywa ngokuzenzekelayo rhoqo emva kweeyure ezi-6 ngomsebenzi we-Hangfire.

pricing.approximatePrice: Utshintsho oluqikelelweyo olusekelwe kumazinga okutshintshiselana ngoku
